name: vibesearch
description: VibeSearch: when someone asks AI about your business, does it say your name? A scoreboard-driven SEO toolkit for Claude Code.

plugins.name: vibesearch
plugins.description: Tracks the real questions your business should be the answer to, checks who owns each one via honest search-visibility probes, and helps you win them one at a time. Seven commands built around one ledger: coach, start, map, win, fix, local, watch. Zero dependencies, built-in memory, no invented metrics.
